channel.title: Prompt-Injection on AI Red Team Log
channel.description: Recent content in Prompt-Injection on AI Red Team Log

item.title: Prompt Injection: a working taxonomy
item.description: My own reference notes on the different flavors of prompt injection and where each shows up in real systems.

item.title: Vulnerable Agent Lab: attacking a tool-using LLM agent
item.description: Building a deliberately vulnerable LangChain agent with file and email tools, then attacking it with indirect prompt injection.

item.title: Week 1: OWASP LLM Top 10 and setting up a local sandbox
item.description: Starting the AI red teaming track. Read through OWASP’s Top 10 for LLM Applications and set up a local LLM + RAG environment to test against.
